title: Powah Pyxal-ated
body:
**Disclaimer: This pack is still a work in progress and doesn't change all textures yet**

Powah is a great tech mod and my goto when I need electricity, but its artstyle isn't quite my taste as it clashes with minecraft's art style and has some -_in my opinion_- over detailed models. So here I am, making a texture pack to make it fit more with the game's aesthetic
<details>
  <summary>Current progress</summary>
  as of 0.2.2, the texture pack changes:
 
  - Items: ALL DONE AT LAST
  
  - Block textures: 43/130
  
 - Block Remodel: 15
</details>

_Since I have started this project it would seem that the mod itself is getting retextured. That said I will still continue this project. On another quick side note, I'm fairly certain the ender cell and energy cell models are hardcoded, and while I will try my best to find a fix I might not be able to do anything about it._
